welcome.title: Log in or sign up
welcome.subtitle: Choose how you’re joining Xaidus.
welcome.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again to continue.
welcome.blurbTeen: Set one goal, get a next step you can actually do today.
welcome.blurbParent: See effort trends and goals — never private messages or monitoring.
welcome.blurbLeader: Support your group with weekly resets and check-ins, role-based and logged.

auth.title: Teen Sign In
auth.usernameHelper: You can use a username you already use on other platforms.
auth.passphraseHelper: Use at least two words so it’s easy to remember but hard to guess.
auth.reasonLabel: What’s your reason for being here?
auth.reasonPlaceholder: e.g., Stay on top of schoolwork without the stress
auth.reasonHelper: We’ll turn this into your first goal.
auth.inviteCodeHelper: Got a code from your parent? Enter it to link your accounts.
auth.introSetGoalDesc: Turn pressure into a next step you can actually do today.
auth.introCheckInDesc: A daily pulse that takes seconds, not another thing hanging over you.
auth.introGrowDesc: Streaks and micro-wins turn effort into identity over time.
auth.haveGroupCode: Have a group code from your leader?
auth.loadingSignupDesc: Setting up your first step so you land ready to move.
auth.loadingLoginDesc: Bringing your goals and streaks back into view.
auth.toastCheckUsernameDesc: Use only letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, or underscores.
auth.toastPassphraseDesc: Use at least two words (e.g., “blue mountain trail”).
auth.toastSignupSuccessDesc: Account created. Let’s set your first step.
auth.toastSignInFailedDesc: We couldn’t sign you in with those details.
auth.toastGroupDetailsDesc: Group code, nickname, and a 4–6 digit PIN are required.
